nodes.title: Street-level diversity correlates with economic resilience

nodes.title: Flint's east side has three remaining corner stores
nodes.summary: Field observation from 2025-03-17 drive-through. All three are at major intersections.

nodes.title: Mixed-use zoning

nodes.title: Dan Kildee
nodes.summary: Former Genesee County Treasurer who conceived the land bank model. Later U.S. Representative.

edges.reason: Kildee created the land bank concept in Genesee County
Land bank as a response to shrinking city dynamics

nodes.title: Genesee County Land Bank
nodes.summary: The nation's first land bank authority, managing thousands of tax-reverted properties in Flint.

edges.reason: Properties managed by GCLBA

nodes.title: Concentrated poverty

nodes.title: Land bank disposition patterns mirror pre-decline commercial corridors

nodes.title: Shrinking cities

nodes.title: Tactical urbanism
nodes.summary: Low-cost, temporary interventions that test permanent changes to the built environment.
